prompt: Implement the full product spec for agent-mailbox from docs/spec.

Ran git init in products/agent-mailbox. pnpm install initially required non-interactive esbuild build approval; after pnpm approve-builds --all, pnpm install exited 0. pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test:unit, pnpm test:integration, pnpm test:e2e, and node scripts/verify-transcripts.mjs exited 0. The verifier replayed T1-T4 exactly and printed verified transcripts T1-T4. Docker CLI is installed, but docker info and docker build hang/fail at the Docker Desktop socket http://%2FUsers%2Fsreeja%2F.docker%2Frun%2Fdocker.sock/v1.48/info even after open -a Docker, so docker build could not complete in this local environment.
result: Agent Mailbox implementation is complete for repo-local code, tests, transcript replay, docs, generated litmus scenarios, generated Product Hunt PNGs, and governance files. Section 16 is blocked only on Docker daemon availability, not on a repo build failure.
commands: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
